name: Friday Night Vibes
overview: Spotlighting feel-good comedies, action-packed blockbusters, and culturally significant storytelling inclusive of diverse voices featuring surprise special guests each week. With a mix of comedy, celebrity interviews, and musical performances, viewers are guided through this celebration of life, cultural diversity, special behind-the-scenes moments, and authentic conversation.

trailers.title: Friday Night Vibes: Tiffany Haddish & Deon Cole Host Back-to-Back Movies with Guest Snoop Dogg | TBS
